// pasbuild-copyright blacklist
// Patterns are regular expressions matched against the file path.
// Path separators are normalised to / before matching, so patterns
// only need to use / regardless of the OS path delimiter (/ or \).
// Lines starting with // or # are comments and are ignored, as are blank lines.

# Example: ignore all files under a vendor directory
# vendor/

# Example: ignore generated files in a specific directory
# src/generated/.*\.pas$

# Example: ignore a single file by exact path
# src/main/pascal/GeneratedCode\.pas$

# Example: ignore all files in any test/ folder
# /test/
